name: btp-drawio-skill
description: A Claude Code plugin that authors SAP Architecture Center / BTP solution diagrams as draw.io files — Horizon palette, grey-circle icons, L0-L3 level conventions, validated and autofixed before save.

plugins.name: sap-architecture
plugins.description: Generate, validate, and autofix SAP / BTP / on-prem architecture diagrams as .drawio files following the official SAP BTP Solution Diagram Guidelines. Bundles 99 SAP BTP service icons + 3 pristine L2 templates.
